extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT won the 10.1km San Benedetto del Tronto time trial by 6 seconds over KÜNG, while POGAČAR secured overall victory by 1:03.
tactical_patterns: Van Aert benefited from racing last when wind conditions potentially lessened, beating Küng who set benchmark earlier.
The abrupt double right-angle turn at halfway point plus bumpy return section favored bike-handling specialists over pure power.

rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: negative: obliterated Bettiol's course record by 12+ seconds but still lost by 6 to van Aert in later conditions
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: placed 4th in specialist time trial beating Ganna by 1 second, showing rapid TT improvement early season
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: negative: could only manage 5th, beaten by over 10 seconds, surprising weakness after winning previous year's stage
